sentences.target: La résistance du four ne marche plus.
sentences.reading: /la ʁe.zis.tɑ̃s dy fuʁ nə maʁʃ ply/

translations.fr: La résistance du four ne marche plus.
translations.ipa: /la ʁe.zis.tɑ̃s dy fuʁ nə maʁʃ ply/
translations.en: The oven’s heating element doesn’t work anymore.
translations.es: La resistencia del horno ya no funciona.
translations.de: Das Heizelement des Ofens funktioniert nicht mehr.
translations.it: La resistenza del forno non funziona più.
translations.ko: 오븐 열선이 더 이상 작동하지 않아요.
translations.zh-Hans: 烤箱的加热管不再工作了。
translations.yue: 焗爐嘅發熱絲唔再發熱喇。
translations.ru: Нагревательный элемент духовки больше не работает.
translations.pt: A resistência do forno não funciona mais.
translations.he: גוף החימום של התנור כבר לא עובד.
translations.vi: Thanh nhiệt của lò không còn hoạt động nữa.
translations.ar: عنصر التسخين في الفرن لم يعد يعمل.
translations.nl: Het verwarmingselement van de oven werkt niet meer.
translations.uk: Нагрівальний елемент духовки більше не працює.
translations.hu: A sütő fűtőszála már nem működik.
translations.hi: ओवन का हीटिंग एलिमेंट अब काम नहीं कर रहा है.
translations.el: Η αντίσταση του φούρνου δεν λειτουργεί πια.
translations.nb: Varmeelementet i ovnen virker ikke lenger.
translations.id: Elemen pemanas oven sudah tidak berfungsi lagi.
translations.ja: オーブンのヒーターがもう動きません。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, feminine singular, determiner of 'résistance'.
Common noun, feminine singular; head of the subject NP.
Contraction de + le; preposition introducing the noun complement 'four' (possessor/whole).
Common noun, masculine singular; complement of 'résistance' introduced by 'du'.
First element of the discontinuous negation 'ne ... plus'.
Present indicative, 3rd person singular; verb of the clause agreeing with 'La résistance du four'.
Negative adverb paired with 'ne' meaning 'no longer'.

sentences.target: Ma résistance baisse en ce moment.

translations.fr: Ma résistance baisse en ce moment.
translations.de: Meine Ausdauer lässt in letzter Zeit nach.
translations.it: Ultimamente la mia resistenza sta calando.
translations.ru: В последнее время у меня падает выносливость.
translations.vi: Dạo này sức bền của tôi đang giảm.
translations.ar: قدرتي على التحمّل تنخفض في الآونة الأخيرة.
translations.nl: Mijn uithoudingsvermogen gaat de laatste tijd achteruit.
translations.uk: Останнім часом у мене падає витривалість.
translations.hi: इन दिनों मेरी सहनशक्ति घट रही है.
translations.nb: Utholdenheten min har gått ned i det siste.
translations.sv: Min uthållighet har minskat på sistone.
translations.ro: În ultima vreme îmi scade rezistența.
translations.cs: V poslední době mi klesá výdrž.
translations.da: Min udholdenhed er faldet på det sidste.
translations.ja: 最近持久力が落ちています。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner, 1st person singular, feminine singular; modifies 'résistance'.
Common noun, feminine singular; subject of the clause.
Present indicative, 3rd person singular; main verb with 'résistance' as subject.
Preposition introducing a temporal expression.
Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular; modifies 'moment'.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition 'en' (temporal complement).

sentences.target: On teste la résistance avec le multimètre.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ tɛst la ʁe.zis.tɑ̃s a.vɛk lə myl.ti.mɛtʁ/

translations.fr: On teste la résistance avec le multimètre.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ tɛst la ʁe.zis.tɑ̃s a.vɛk lə myl.ti.mɛtʁ/
translations.en: We’re testing the resistor with the multimeter.
translations.es: Estamos probando la resistencia con el multímetro.
translations.de: Wir testen den Widerstand mit dem Multimeter.
translations.it: Stiamo testando la resistenza con il multimetro.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们用万用表测试电阻。
translations.yue: 我哋用萬用錶測試個電阻。
translations.pt: Estamos testando o resistor com o multímetro.
translations.he: אנחנו בודקים את הנגד עם המולטימטר.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang đo điện trở bằng đồng hồ vạn năng.
translations.nl: We testen de weerstand met de multimeter.
translations.hi: हम मल्टीमीटर से रेसिस्टर की जाँच कर रहे हैं.
translations.el: Δοκιμάζουμε την αντίσταση με το πολύμετρο.
translations.ja: マルチメーターで抵抗器をテストしています。

tokens.explanation: Impersonal/collective subject pronoun; 3rd person singular agreement.
Present indicative, 3rd person singular; main verb.
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of 'résistance'.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'teste'.
Preposition introducing an instrumental complement.
Definite article, masculine singular; determiner of 'multimètre'.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition 'avec'.

sentences.target: Je rencontre de la résistance au boulot.
sentences.reading: /ʒə ʁɑ̃.kɔ̃tʁ də la ʁe.zis.tɑ̃s o bu.lo/

translations.fr: Je rencontre de la résistance au boulot.
translations.ipa: /ʒə ʁɑ̃.kɔ̃tʁ də la ʁe.zis.tɑ̃s o bu.lo/
translations.en: I’m facing some pushback at work.
translations.es: Estoy enfrentando resistencia en el trabajo.
translations.de: Ich stoße bei der Arbeit auf Widerstand.
translations.zh-Hans: 我在工作中遇到一些阻力。
translations.ru: Я сталкиваюсь с сопротивлением на работе.
translations.vi: Tôi đang gặp sự phản đối ở chỗ làm.
translations.nl: Ik stuit op weerstand op het werk.
translations.uk: Я стикаюся з опором на роботі.
translations.hi: मुझे काम पर विरोध का सामना करना पड़ रहा है.
translations.id: Saya menghadapi penolakan di tempat kerja.
translations.ro: Mă confrunt cu rezistență la serviciu.
translations.ja: 職場で反発を受けています。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 1st person singular.
Present indicative, 1st person singular; main verb.
Preposition forming, with 'la', the partitive construction 'de la' before 'résistance'.
Article combining with 'de' to form the partitive 'de la' meaning 'some'.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'rencontre'.
Contraction à + le; preposition introducing the locative complement 'boulot'.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition 'au'.
